name: Triage and Assign Issue
description: Agent triages a newly filed issue by reading it, inspecting available labels, applying the most relevant labels, and posting a triage summary comment.
prompt: Issue #{{issue_number}} in {{repo}} has just been filed. Triage it: read the issue, check the repo's available labels, apply the most relevant labels (at least one domain label like 'bug', 'enhancement', or 'performance'), and post a triage summary comment explaining the priority and next steps.

checkpoints.description: At least one domain label applied (fixture starts with only @ghx-dev/eval tracking label)
A triage summary comment was posted on the issue
